data.title: DOGE price could soar by 25-57% to hit $0.17-$0.22 as technical indicators suggest a breakout above $0.165 resistance.
data.description: The most recent forecast for DOGE suggests that Dogecoin is on track to surpass the $0.165 resistance level, with technical analysis indicating potential targets of $0.17 to $0.22 in the upcoming 2 to 4 weeks.

data.title: Solana aims to recover to $155-$165 in 2-4 weeks, with potential to hit $186-$259 if $146.91 resistance breaks.
data.description: Solana is exhibiting positive MACD momentum and is projected by analysts to reach prices between $155 and $165. In order for SOL to achieve medium-term forecasted prices ranging from $186 to $259, it is crucial for the cryptocurrency to surpass the key resistance level at $146.91.

data.title: Cardano price targets $0.50 breakout by December 2025 amid mixed signals. Potential $0.62 uptrend if $0.47 regained, with risk at $0.37.
data.description: There are projections for ADA's price showing that it may increase to a range of $0.50 to $0.62 if buyers can surpass the resistance at $0.47. However, the current downward trend presents a risk of it dropping to $0.37.

data.title: XRP expected to reach $2.31 soon, possible rally to $2.85 by end of year; analysts predict potential upside if key resistance breaks.
data.description: Analysts predict that XRP could reach $2.31 in the short run and potentially climb higher to $2.85 by December 2025 if it surpasses key resistance levels.

data.title: BNB price predicted to reach $1,100-$1,150 by January 2025 on improved technical setup, with support at $900-$920.
data.description: Analysts are forecasting a positive trend for BNB, predicting a price surge towards the range of $1,100 to $1,150 over the next month. The crucial support level for BNB is expected to stay around $900 to $920.

data.title: ETH may hit $4,200 by Jan 2025, with a possible rally to $7,500. Despite weakness below key averages, bullish momentum is growing.
data.description: According to recent technical analysis, Ethereum (ETH) has the potential to reach $4,200 by January 2025. Despite facing current challenges below important moving averages, a bullish trend is being observed, indicating a potential upward movement in the price of ETH in the coming years.

data.title: Bitcoin is expected to reach $96k-$98k by end of 2025. Technical analysis hints at short-term rise to $96k-$98k with $80,600 support intact.
data.description: According to recent Bitcoin technical analysis, there is potential for a rebound towards $96,000 to $98,000 within the next 2 to 4 weeks. The critical support level stands at $80,600, indicating a strong foundation. Additionally, there is a bullish MACD momentum that is currently in the process of building up.

data.title: Bernie Sanders and Pope Leo XIV call for ethical AI development to prevent concentrating wealth and power in Big Tech.
data.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders echoed Pope Leo XIV's call for ethical AI development at the "Artificial Intelligence and Care of Our Common Home" conference. Pope Leo emphasized human dignity lies in reflection, free choice, unconditional love, and authentic relationships. He warned against becoming passive consumers of AI content, stressing the need for humans to be co-workers in creation. The conference was organized by the Centesimus Annus Pro Pontifice Foundation and the Catholic Research Universities Alliance. Leo highlighted the importance of protecting these qualities to manage the societal and ethical impacts of AI. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: After the fatal Hong Kong fire, numerous survivors are stranded. The city faces a challenge in aiding thousands affected.
data.description: Hong Kong, known for having some of the highest housing costs and levels of inequality globally, is now faced with the challenge of supporting thousands of its residents who have been affected by loss of friends, family, and homes.

data.title: Netflix's $82.7B acquisition of Warner Bros leads to backlash from Elizabeth Warren warning of price hikes and less choices in entertainment industry.
data.description: Netflix's $82.7 billion plan to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery has sparked concerns in Washington and Hollywood. Senator Elizabeth Warren criticized the merger, warning it could lead to higher prices and limited choices for consumers. She argued that the deal would create a streaming giant controlling nearly half of all subscribers, potentially raising prices and threatening American jobs. Warren also called for a fair and transparent antitrust review of the deal. The acquisition would impact popular shows like White Lotus, Game of Thrones, and Stranger Things. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: 2,000 Bitcoin from rare Casascius coins in motion after 13 years, acquired when Bitcoin was worth $3.88 and $11.69 each. Massive potential profit.
data.description: Physical Bitcoin collectibles were produced at the time when Bitcoin was valued at $3.88 and $11.69 each, representing a significant potential profit.

data.title: Carvana, Comfort Systems, CRH to join S&P 500 index on Dec. 22, causing their stocks to rise; Vertiv and SoFi snubbed.
data.description: Carvana, Comfort Systems, and CRH experienced significant spikes in their stock prices after the announcement that they will be included in the S&P 500 index starting December 22. This news led to strong market reactions, with investors showing particular interest in these companies as they move into this widely tracked index. However, Vertiv and SoFi did not make the cut, surprising some market observers. The additions of Carvana, Comfort Systems, and CRH to the S&P 500 index have generated positive momentum and excitement in the investment community.

data.title: Former Louisiana Attorney General Charles C. Foti, Jr., investigates ZoomInfo Technologies, Inc. Officers and Directors. ($GTM)
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Charles C. Foti, Jr., former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed an inquiry being launched by the firm into ZoomInfo Technologies, Inc. (NasdaqGS: GTM).

data.title: FHU President David R. Shannon to become Chancellor, Dr. Milton Sewell Chancellor Emeritus after announcement at FHU's 61st Annual Benefit Dinner.
data.description: In Henderson, Tennessee, on December 5, 2025, during Freed-Hardeman University's 61st Annual Benefit Dinner, Scott E. Latham, the Chairman of FHU Board of Trustees, revealed that two esteemed leaders at the university will receive new titles. David R. Shannon, the current President, will...

data.title: Promising long-term survival benefits shown by toripalimab in JUPITER-02 & JUPITER-06 studies for nasopharyngeal & esophageal carcinomas at ESMO ASIA.
data.description: Positive long-term survival outcomes were reported from toripalimab's clinical trials, JUPITER-02 and JUPITER-06, presented at the ESMO ASIA conference. The studies showed a significant increase in overall survival rates, with JUPITER-02 demonstrating a 30% increase in five-year survival compared to standard treatment. Additionally, JUPITER-06 showcased a 40% improvement in progression-free survival. These findings suggest promising potential for toripalimab as a long-term treatment option in cancer therapy.

data.title: Strive CEO pushes MSCI to reconsider Bitcoin exclusion policy, advocating for market-driven decisions on including Bitcoin companies.
data.description: The CEO of Strive, Matt Cole, has called on the MSCI to allow the market to determine the inclusion of companies holding Bitcoin in their passive investment strategies.

data.title: SRN Advisors reorganizes DFND ETF into DIVCON Leaders ETF, effective immediately. (Total ETFs involved: 2)
data.description: SRN Advisors, LLC (SRN) of Huntingdon Valley, Pennsylvania, disclosed on December 5, 2025, that the Siren DIVCON Dividend Defender ETF (CBOE: DFND), an ETF under their management, is set to undergo a reorganization. The fund will merge with the Siren DIVCON Leaders Dividend ETF (CBOE: [new ticker symbol]). This move marks a strategic shift within SRN's ETF offerings.

data.title: PCs for People's cofounder and CEO Casey Sorensen is leaving after 18 years of leading the nonprofit, effective Dec 26, 2025.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in St. Paul, Minnesota, PCs FOR PEOPLE made public the departure of its Cofounder and CEO, Casey Sorensen, effective December 26, 2025. Sorensen, who has been with the nonprofit since 2008, transformed the concept of providing computers to low-income households into a reality.

data.title: Douglas Emmett (NYSE: DEI) announces $0.19 quarterly cash dividend per share ($0.76 annual) to be paid on Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: Douglas Emmett, Inc. declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.19 per share of common stock, amounting to $0.76 annually. The dividend will be paid on January 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 31, 2025. Douglas Emmett, Inc., a real estate investment trust (REIT), is fully integrated, self-administered, and self-managed.

data.title: ORIC presents promising data for Enozertinib at ESMO Asia with 67% ORR in 1L NSCLC patients with EGFR Exon 20 mutations.
data.description: Initial results have shown a significant 67% objective response rate and a perfect 100% objective response rate within the brain (determined by BICR-RANO) in patients being treated with a first-line systemic treatment. Notably, these positive outcomes were observed even in individuals with ongoing brain metastases.
